Kidplokio 12pc Army Semi Truck Superhero Cinch Bag Backpack Gift Bundle Boys 3+

Does your child love all things toy trucks and superheroes? Then they will love this Army Semi Truck Carrier and Cinch Bag Bundle gift set this holiday season! The awesome 11pc Army Military Semi Truck Toy Vehicle Transporter with 6 Diecast Cars Playset comes with six military diecast vehicles and some roadside accessories, that can be tucked away into the sides of the larger semi truck transporter toy. The larger semi-truck toy features two plastic snap-closure sidings to ensure all the pieces stay together after playtime and don’t get lost! The cinch bag features some of everyone’s favorite superheroes, making this the perfect toy and backpack combo for on-the-go playdates!

The front of the military army semi truck toy also features a cool, built-in diecast car slide! Kids can place diecast cars down the slide and watch the cars shoot out the front of the truck; a fun game in itself to see whose car can make it the farthest! No batteries or assembly are required here.

Key Features

  • TOY TRUCK AND BACKPACK BUNDLE - Kidplokio Semi Truck Carrier and Backpack bundle comes with a cool military-style toy truck and a superhero-themed cinch bag for boys; Battle against enemies or evil villains for hours of fun pretend play with 6 diecast vehicles and a cinch bag backpack
  • ARMY MILITARY SEMI TRUCK TOY - This awesome semi truck toy comes with 6 military diecast vehicles, that can be tucked away into the sides of a larger semi truck transporter toy! The larger semi-truck toy features two plastic snap-closure sidings to ensure all the pieces stay together after playtime
  • LARGE CAPACITY BAG - Drawstring tote bag measures 18” and can easily hold children’s school supplies and sporting gear. Kids can securely carry their binders, notebooks, school books, and water bottles to and from school, sports practice, and play dates
  • DURABLE MATERIAL - Cinch backpacks are made of durable, water-resistant polyester to protect your child’s back-to-school materials and supplies even in inclement weather; Robot toy is made of plastic that can be easily wiped down and air-dried in between uses to keep it clean
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Items included in bundle set: 2 (toy truck & cinch bag); Colors: assorted; Characters: superheroes & army; Recommended age: 3 years and up; Material: plastic (semi truck carrier), water-resistant polyester (cinch bag)

Product Specifications

  • MPN: LSTKPLRTTLSGRBYBLU
  • UPC: 885189342703
  • Color: Multicolor
  • Size: Medium

The army military toy truck car transporter is constructed of heavy-duty, durable plastic, meaning it can stand up to lots of everyday playtime wear and tear whether at home, traveling, or out at play dates. In addition, playing with a manual truck toy can also help your little one use his or her imagination, encourage exploration and creativity, sharpen their motor skills, and learn to share with their playmates too!

Each drawstring tote bag measures 18” by 13” and can easily hold your child’s school supplies and sporting gear like binders, school books, notebooks, accessories, and a water bottle. The bag features an easy-to-use cinch closure to ensure supplies stay secured in the bag when not in use.

The adjustable cinch strap design provides customizable comfort that will fit most kids. The bag itself is made of durable water-resistant polyester to protect your child’s school materials and supplies rain or shine.

PLEASE NOTE: Truck carrier toy comes in assorted colors (ships at random)
